meta_description: Junying is a leading OEM manufacturer of Acetal/Delrin/POM CNC turning and milling parts with uncompromising quality and favorable prices.

sections.heading: Delrin/POM CNC Turning and Milling Parts
sections.text: Delrin/POM CNC Turning and Milling Parts Junying is a leading OEM manufacturer of Acetal/Delrin/POM CNC turning and milling parts with uncompromising quality and favorable prices. Polyoxymethylene (POM), also known as acetal, polyacetal, and polyformaldehyde, is an engineering plastic ideal for precision CNC parts machining, POM plastic products have high stiffness, low friction, high flexural and tensile strength, hardness, low creep under stress and excellent dimensional stability. All of these qualities make POM parts often used to replace metal products and widely applied in almost all industries, including plumbing, hardware, mechanical, automotive , electronics, and machinery. Advanta...
